## Epic

This epic encompasses the complete AI-powered leftover recipe app functionality that addresses food waste and meal planning friction. The requirements include:

**Core Requirements:**
- Photo-based ingredient detection with 75%+ accuracy using AI processing (using ensemble strategy)
- AI recipe generation that maximizes ingredient usage and complies with dietary restrictions  


**Technical Requirements:**
- 12-week MVP delivery timeline

## User Stories
- [ ] As a user with leftover ingredients, I want to take a photo of my ingredients, so that the app can automatically identify what I have available for cooking
- [ ] As a user with identified ingredients, I want the app to generate personalized recipes, so that I can create meals using what I already have
- [ ] As a user viewing a recipe, I want to identify missing ingredients and create a shopping list, so that I can complete the recipe preparation
- [ ] As a user with a shopping list, I want to seamlessly order missing ingredients through Instacart, so that I can complete my recipe without leaving the app
- [ ] As a user who has generated recipes, I want to save and access my recipe history, so that I can recreate successful meals and track my cooking patterns
- [ ] As a regular app user, I want the app to learn my preferences and dietary restrictions, so that recipe suggestions become more personalized over time
